description_long: This is a large, boxy sofa with a modern, minimalist design, featuring straight, clean lines and a uniform dark color throughout. The sofa has high, flat back and side panels that form a rectangular enclosure, with the seat area recessed within these walls. The base and sides extend outward in flat panels, possibly as part of a modular or protective design, giving the sofa a distinctive, almost architectural appearance. The seat area appears to be a single, continuous cushion, with no visible segmentation or tufting, and the backrest is similarly unadorned and straight. There are no visible armrests or legs, as the side panels extend all the way to the ground, creating a monolithic look. The upholstery is smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A large, boxy, modern sofa with high, flat sides and back, finished in a uniform dark color and featuring a single, smooth seat cushion. The design is minimalist, with no visible legs, armrests, or decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sofa's wide, flat front panel and the extended base panels, emphasizing its boxy, enclosed shape.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the sofa and the high, flat side panels, with the seat area recessed inside.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the solid, uninterrupted back panel and the extended base, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the high side panel and the recessed seat, with the base panels extending outward.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat cushion with no visible segmentation; backrest is a single, flat panel with no loose or attached cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: No visible armrests; side panels are high, flat, and extend straight up from the base, forming the sofa's enclosure.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa's base panels extend to the ground, giving a solid, monolithic appearance with no exposed supports.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with no segmentation, tufting, or attached cushions; matches the height of the side panels.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth, matte fabric with no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
